title: cicerbita neglecta
intro: Cicerbita neglecta, also known as the annual blue lettuce or blue lettuce, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cicerbita neglecta typically involve drying the leaves or roots and using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
